final_plan.summary: Fix the JSX transform error by properly enabling TSX support: rename the entry file to .tsx, update tsconfig and index.html references, and verify the Vite/React JSX compiler options.

bootstrap_commands.purpose: Launch development server to confirm build status

target_files.details: Rename main.ts to main.tsx to enable TSX parsing
Set `compilerOptions.jsx` to `"react-jsx"` (or appropriate JSX setting) and include `"src/**/*.tsx"` in `include`
Ensure Vite's `esbuild` or `@vitejs/plugin-react` is configured for TSX/JSX support if a custom config exists

constraints: Preserve Git history when renaming files
No changes to business logic or styling beyond entrypoint fix
validation: Run `npm run dev` and confirm no build or transform errors
Verify the home page loads and CityClock components render correctly
Confirm tsconfig changes do not break IDE or CI builds
review_guidelines: Ensure the rename from .ts to .tsx preserves file history (git mv)
Check tsconfig modifications match existing formatting and comments
Validate index.html change only affects the script src line
Confirm no unintended side‑effects in Vite config or package.json
discovery_hints: Review package.json dependencies for React/Preact to confirm JSX runtime
Inspect existing vite.config.js/ts for extraneous JSX plugins
Check IDE/CI lint and build steps for TSX inclusion

goals: Enable TSX syntax support for the project entrypoint
Eliminate the transform error and restore local dev server
Maintain existing SPA behavior without logical regressions
acceptance_criteria: main.tsx is recognized and executed by Vite
CityClock component renders correctly in browser
CI pipeline passes TypeScript and build checks
non_goals: Introducing a backend or database layer

execution_steps.purpose: Launch development server to confirm build status

constraints: Preserve Git history when renaming files
No changes to business logic or styling beyond entrypoint fix
validation: Run `npm run dev` and confirm no build or transform errors
Verify the home page loads and CityClock components render correctly
Confirm tsconfig changes do not break IDE or CI builds
